name: agy-gemini-local
description: Local marketplace for the agy-gemini plugin — a bidirectional agent bridge exposing gemini_agent and claude_agent as MCP tools, plus a delegation skill.

plugins.name: agy-gemini
plugins.description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server: exposes `gemini_agent` (spawn a Gemini agent via the Antigravity `agy` CLI) and `claude_agent` (spawn a Claude agent via the `claude` CLI), plus a skill for delegating to Gemini.
